result.reason: The issue describes confusing UX and possibly broken inheritance/default properties behavior from v1.77.2 (2022); we've already posted triage refresh comments asking for reproduction steps on the latest build, and no confirmation has been received.
result.approach: Wait for reporter to retest on v1.80+/v1.81+ with reproducible steps; if confirmed broken, audit how DefaultConnectionInheritance propagates values through the tree and fix the getter logic.
